Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I understand their reasoning...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}But if... if they really go through with this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}If we lose that tree... it would be like losing our son all over again...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}You'll understand once you're a parent, {f 4 2}-chan. We can't help thinking of our children.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}For me, that tree is my son. My son who passed away... That's what remains of him...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 13 6 15 104}We're fine. We're not fighting. I was just fussing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Apparently, the rumor about cutting down the persimmon tree was true.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}So, we went to the school together to say our goodbyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Unfortunately, that just reminded my dear of the pain we felt the day our son died...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}See, dear? That's exactly what I said![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}If you keep crying all the time, then what'll your admirers think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 104 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Oh my... Don't make fun of this wrinkled old lady.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can sense the elderly[n]couple's appreciation.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Stop by again anytime, all right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}My wife would always be happy to see such a handsome young man.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 103 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Here, take this for when you get hungry.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Bunkichi-san stuffed a delicious-looking[n]bread into my pocket.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted with the elderly couple[n]and went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
